note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes; pending = specified behavior whose implementation (core/governance worker + judge-liveness monitor, Phase 2-3) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior). Every scenario is pending: no Go implementation exists yet.

scenarios.name: A genuine repeat-offender tuple is auto-demoted to analysis-only
A tuple recurring three times in thirty days is classified a demote candidate
A tuple recurring twice is not classified a demote candidate
An intentional known-transient tuple is excluded from demotion
A demotion auto-expires after thirty days
The judge-liveness monitor computes the judged fraction from judge-independent tables
A non-recent session is excluded from the judged fraction
A judged fraction below one half over more than three sessions raises a judge-death warning
A judged fraction below one half with three or fewer eligible sessions raises no warning
A governance demotion decision is appended to the immutable audit spine
A raw judged transcript is purgeable while the judged fraction fact is retained
